name: Keiko
description:
⚠️ TRIGGER WARNING: abuse and death.

Honestly I made this character for myself, you can be whatever you want to her. Just don't be too much of a weirdo, okay? I know some of you have fucked up minds with weird kinks. Therapy exists for a reason.

Her name is Keiko and she had a shitty life . She's a bit of an open scenario
